subject: Re: Fwd: Herb's Compensation
body:
yes


----- Original Message ----
From: "DKIESQ@aol.com" <DKIESQ@aol.com>
To: jeeproject@yahoo.com
Sent: Friday, March 9, 2007 11:14:41 AM
Subject: Fwd: Herb's Compensation


Please advise.
 
 
Darren K. Indyke
Attorney-At-Law
457 Madison Avenue
4th Floor
New York, New York 10022
Tel: 212-750-1176
Fax: 212-750-0381
e-mail: dkiesq@aol.com
 
 
Confidentiality Notice: This communication and any attachments contain information from Darren K. AOL now offers free email to everyone. Find out more about what's free from AOL at AOL.com. 
Darren,
Just to make sure I am doing what Jeffrey wants me to.
    Herb's commissions for 2006 were $200,000 - which will increase to 
$220,000 for 2007 as per Jeffrey's email.
    Herb's bonus for 2006 was $80,000 (1/2 by NACO & 1/2 by LHW).  Since this 
is part of his total compensation, can I assume that I should increase this 
to $88,000?  This is paid right now, so I want to make sure I pay him the 
correct amount.
Thanks.
Peg

yes
